This directory is a build-time placeholder so `cargo check` and `pnpm tauri dev`
resolve the Tauri bundle resource on a fresh clone.

The REAL frozen engine sidecar is produced by PyInstaller and written here
before `pnpm tauri build` / the release workflow:

    uv run pyinstaller packaging/omni-engine.spec --distpath packaging/dist

See packaging/README.md. This placeholder is overwritten by the real build
output and is never shipped in a release installer.
